description: A vector handwriting annotation view layered over rendered Markdown, with pen/touch separation, autosave, SVG preview, and basic block re-anchoring. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Handwriting Markdown View

releases.author: decai335335-debug
releases.description:
Initial release of Handwriting Markdown View plugin for Obsidian.

### What's included
- Independent handwriting view panel
- Pen, highlighter, eraser, move, undo/redo
- Pressure/tilt/twist data collection
- Touch gesture separation (draw vs scroll vs zoom)
- Configurable side button mapping
- Ink persistence with SVG preview
- Cross-platform (desktop + mobile)
